chunks.text: EMSOFT 2010 About EMSOFT The International Conference on Embedded Software (EMSOFT) brings together researchers and developers from academia, industry, and government to advance the science, engineering, and technology in embedded software developmen

ng, and technology in embedded software development. EMSOFT 2010 (the 10th in the series!) is part of Embedded Systems Week . Please visit www.esweek.org for venue and travel information. Important Dates Abstract submission: Tuesday, April 6, 2010 (e

tes Abstract submission: Tuesday, April 6, 2010 (extended!) Full paper submission: submission system closes on April 12, 9:00 a.m. GMT-12. Rebuttal process: Wed June 9: initial reviews sent to authors. Authors to prepare a max. 300 word response. Mon

. Authors to prepare a max. 300 word response. Mon June 14, 11pm Pacific time: deadline to enter the response in the system. Acceptance notification: Monday, June 28, 2010 Final version submission: Tentative date: Tuesday, August 10, 2010 Confirmed

Tentative date: Tuesday, August 10, 2010 Confirmed date and instructions are provided in the email that you should have received from ACM publications If you did not receive an email, notify the Chairs Conference: October 24-29, 2010 (Sun - Fri) ESW
